title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt – Complete Edition (Next-Gen)
description: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt – Complete Edition modernizes CD PROJEKT RED's award-winning RPG with ray tracing, DLSS, improved textures, enhanced foliage, faster loading, and numerous gameplay improvements. Players once again assume the role of Geralt of Rivia as he searches for Ciri across a vast open world filled with monsters, political intrigue, and memorable quests. The Next-Gen update transforms one of gaming's greatest RPGs into a visually stunning modern experience.
benchmarkNotes: Ray-traced Global Illumination and Ambient Occlusion
One of the most visually impressive RPGs after the Next-Gen update
